Name: boundary_aware_segmentation_loss
Title: Can boundary-aware losses improve dental segmentation quality on thin or ambiguous structures?
Experiment: Compare the baseline segmentation objective against variants that emphasize boundary quality or small-structure overlap. Test whether these changes improve segmentation performance on clinically important edges without destabilizing training.

Name: preprocessing_for_mask_stability
Title: Does radiograph-aware preprocessing improve mask stability in dental segmentation?
Experiment: Compare identity preprocessing against grayscale, autocontrast, or equalization-style preprocessing for dental segmentation. Evaluate whether cleaner intensity normalization improves overlap and boundary consistency, especially on noisy or low-contrast images.
